sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hih leitung mawhna khuamial bangin zinga,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nuam takin, kei tung zong hong tang hi;
Kei mittawsa tu’n khua ka muta,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh sung omte khuamial in tuam lo a,
Lam hilhpa zui leng khuavak sung kipai-a,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawhna khuamial sunga mittaw mite aw,
muhkikna dingin va kisil un aw,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kham khuapi sung khuavak sak Tuuno hi
